original: This piece of equipment comprises an array of sleek metallic limbs to be worn over the skin, side-hugging the user’s muscles and curves. In addition to giving the user a distinct cyberpunk look, the system responds to their motor inputs, facilitating movement and supplying additional carrying power, though a bit of reaction speed is sacrificed in the process. Microbots quickly repair any damage suffered by the exoskeleton, ensuring it’s always operational, but on the downside it’s vulnerable to electric attacks.\n\n(Allows the wearer to equip weapons as if they were wearing power armor in the armor slot.)
